URL: https://github.com/BehaviorTree/BehaviorTree.CPP
Language: c++
Behavior Trees Library in C++. Batteries included.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LadybirdBrowser/ladybird
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LadybirdBrowser/ladybird
Language: c++
Truly independent web browser

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/TensorRT
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/TensorRT
Language: c++
NVIDIA® TensorRT™ is an SDK for high-performance deep learning inference on NVIDIA GPUs. This repository contains the open source components of TensorRT.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PX4/PX4-Autopilot
Language: c++

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PaddlePaddle/Paddle
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/Paddle
Language: c++
PArallel Distributed Deep LEarning: Machine Learning Framework from Industrial Practice （『飞桨』核心框架，深度学习&机器学习高性能单机、分布式训练和跨平台部署）

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Tencent/ncnn
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tencent/ncnn
Language: c++
ncnn is a high-performance neural network inference framework optimized for the mobile platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alibaba/MNN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alibaba/MNN
Language: c++
MNN is a blazing fast, lightweight deep learning framework, battle-tested by business-critical use cases in Alibaba. Full multimodal LLM Android App:[MNN-LLM-Android](./apps/Android/MnnLlmChat/README.md). MNN TaoAvatar Android - Local 3D Avatar Intelligence: apps/Android/Mnn3dAvatar/README.md

ns0:entry.ns0:title: autowarefoundation/autoware_vision_pilot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/autowarefoundation/autoware_vision_pilot
Language: c++
Free self-driving car stack - fully open-source ADAS and autonomous driving system

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ceph/ceph
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ceph/ceph
Language: c++
Ceph is a distributed object, block, and file storage platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: deskflow/deskflow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/deskflow/deskflow
Language: c++
Share a single keyboard and mouse between multiple computers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dmlc/xgboost
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dmlc/xgboost
Language: c++
Scalable, Portable and Distributed Gradient Boosting (GBDT, GBRT or GBM) Library, for Python, R, Java, Scala, C++ and more. Runs on single machine, Hadoop, Spark, Dask, Flink and DataFlow

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebook/folly
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebook/folly
Language: c++
An open-source C++ library developed and used at Facebook.

Language: c++
GoogleTest - Google Testing and Mocking Framework

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/leveldb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/leveldb
Language: c++
LevelDB is a fast key-value storage library written at Google that provides an ordered mapping from string keys to string values.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/perfetto
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/perfetto
Language: c++
Production-grade client-side tracing, profiling, and analysis for complex software systems.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx
Language: c++
Speech-to-text, text-to-speech, speaker diarization, speech enhancement, source separation, and VAD using next-gen Kaldi with onnxruntime without Internet connection. Support embedded systems, Android, iOS, HarmonyOS, Raspberry Pi, RISC-V, RK NPU, Axera NPU, Ascend NPU, x86_64 servers, websocket server/client, support 12 programming languages

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mavlink/qgroundcontrol
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mavlink/qgroundcontrol
Language: c++
Cross-platform ground control station for drones (Android, iOS, Mac OS, Linux, Windows)

Matter (formerly Project CHIP) creates more connections between more objects, simplifying development for manufacturers and increasing compatibility for consumers, guided by the Connectivity Standards Alliance.
